name: punchwall-shop-and-pet
description: Validate the first fist purchase and one Studio-granted wall egg without charging Coins.

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation", 5)
assert(command, "missing PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("Reset")
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("SetStats", { Coins = 1000, FistMultiplier = 1, BreakSpeed = 1, Luck = 1, PetMultiplier = 0, EquippedFist = "Starter Glove", Pet = "None" }))

expectRegex: "Pet"\s*:\s*"(Forest Pup|Miner Cat|Crystal Fox|Lava Dragon|Secret Titan Golem)"
steps.label: hatch one pet

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local gui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui"):WaitForChild("PunchWallHUD", 5)
local wanted = { Coins = true, EquippedFist = true, Pet = true }
local labels = {}
for _, descendant in ipairs(gui:GetDescendants()) do
	if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and wanted[descendant.Name] then
		labels[descendant.Name] = descendant.Text
	end
end
return HttpService:JSONEncode(labels)
